name: Get AWS Security Hub Findings
description: Retrieves AWS Security Hub vulnerability findings for a specific AWS account and writes results to JSON

inputParameters.name: AwsAccountId
inputParameters.label: AWS Account ID
inputParameters.description: The AWS account ID to filter Security Hub findings (12 digits)

inputParameters.name: ComplianceStatus
inputParameters.label: Compliance Status
inputParameters.description: Compliance status filter for findings (PASSED, WARNING, FAILED, NOT_AVAILABLE, or ALL for no compliance filter)

outputParameters.name: FindingsCount
outputParameters.label: Findings Count
outputParameters.description: The number of findings returned by the query

outputParameters.name: FindingsFile
outputParameters.label: Findings File
outputParameters.description: The output file name containing Security Hub findings
